name: openvox
description: Privacy-first open-source browser studio for professional voice training, audio analysis, instrument tuning, transcription, notation and choir rehearsal.
author: AuthorChe (Vadym Yemelianov)

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && tsc -b && vite build && node scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build:wasm && node scripts/test-wasm.mjs && node scripts/test-core.mjs && vitest run
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run verify
scripts.quality: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run check:deps && npm run check:public && npm run test && npm run sbom && npm run build && npm run verify
scripts.check:public: node --check public/pro-lab/dsp-library.js && node --check public/pro-lab/pro-audio-lab.js && node --check public/worklets/audio-processor.js
